iterations.summary: Infrastructure + 1 fresh trace. Resumable state machine in place.
deliverables: scripts/decontaminate.py (13-gram Jaccard against full trace text)
1 fresh trace: ex_2_20 (Morse normal form, multidim distinct from existing traces)
iterations.constraint_discovered: Etingof has only 35 Exercises total. Examples are demonstrations not problems. So 30 trace + 30 eval split is not achievable from this PDF alone. Iteration 2 must decide: shrink to ~12+12, add a second source, or run with smaller eval set.

extract.note: Examples are demonstrations not judgeable problems; expansion stopped

planned: DECISION: allocation strategy. Recommendation pending Oskar review: 18 trace + 12 eval (use the 17 most-judgeable Exercises as eval, rest as traces) — preserves stratification, slightly under-powered statistically but honest given source constraint.
Tag the 35 Exercises by judgeability (cheap Haiku call) and chapter/technique
Allocate trace vs eval; run decontamination check
Struct-transform ex_2_20 (catch up); generate 4-5 more fresh traces
End iter 2 with traces=8-9 and full eval-set decided
